content.en:
The Eternal Immortal Ancestral Body was completely condensed, and Ye Tian began to cultivate and control it.

He had never cultivated physical control, so he could only be considered to be twice as capable of controlling it now.

The so-called control exercise is to mobilize the power of countless billions of cells in the body, and almost every cell is controlled as a world, the stronger the physical body, the stronger the cell world, and the difficulty of controlling the physical body to 365 times is naturally stronger.

And Ye Tian condensed the Eternal Immortal Ancestor Body, how terrifying his physical body was, it was far more difficult to control such a body to a level of 365 times than the imagination of other Invincible Domain Ancestors.

However, Ye Tian has a cheat, and that is the derivation characteristic.

He can deduce the control of the physical body through the characteristics of derivation, and even use the replica body as an experiment, it doesn't matter if he dies madly, but instead of the body, the replica body is broken, and he can recondense a replica body again.

Therefore, with the characteristics of derivation and the copying of the body, Ye Tian's speed of controlling the body will be very fast.

Therefore, he did not panic at all.

"Let's start taking control of our bodies!"

Ye Tian began to control again and again for a long time, constantly evolving and deducing, and his understanding of the body became deeper and deeper.

Years!

Millions of years!

100 million years!

At this time, Ye Tian had already increased from one time his body control to thirteen times his body control, and such a fast control and improvement speed far exceeded that of others.

"Go on!"

It took another billion years, and Ye Tian's degree of control over his body increased to sixty-two times.

The further you go, the more difficult it is to control your body.

If someone else had such a terrifying body as Ye Tian, I am afraid that it would be difficult to completely control the 365 times the body for endless billions of years.

Therefore, the physical body is too strong, and sometimes it is not necessarily a good thing.

The degree of physical control had increased to sixty-two times, and Ye Tian's combat power had reached an incomparably terrifying level.

"Don't be in a hurry to cultivate, it's time to deal with the Qingyuan Holy Land!"

Ye Tian muttered.

At the beginning, the Qingyuan Holy Land sent two invincible domain ancestors to snatch the saint-level ore veins of the human race, and also killed a group of human domain ancestors.

He still remembers this incident.

In addition, the Qingyuan Holy Land also invited the Weeping Blood Emperor to save people, if it weren't for the Invincible Domain Ancestor of the Battle Gate, the two Invincible Domain Ancestors of the Qingyuan Holy Land would have been rescued, and even the saint-level ore veins of the human race would have been snatched away.

Even, his life will be in danger.

Therefore, he always remembered this incident.

In the past, his strength was weak, and he couldn't solve the Qingyuan Holy Land.

Now, his strength is already extremely terrifying, and he has the strength to solve the small trouble of Qingyuan Holy Land.

Of course, before preparing to deal with the Qingyuan Holy Land, Ye Tian first reported to the battle gate.

......

War Tower.

"Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor, I want to deal with the Qingyuan Holy Land!"

Ye Tian saw an incarnation of the Fire Emblem War Ancestor and said.

"Oh, why are you dealing with the Qingyuan Holy Land?"

Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor said curiously.

"At the beginning, the Qingyuan Holy Land sent people to snatch the saint-level ore veins of our human race, and also killed many domain ancestors of our human race, and sent the Weeping Blood Emperor to rescue, but fortunately, the ancient sea ancestors came to help, and the crisis was resolved!"

Ye Tiandao.

"That incident, I have a little impression, it turned out that the ancestor of the Qingyuan Domain did it!"

The Fire Emblem War Ancestor was a little surprised.

Immediately, he said again: "Ye Tian, after all, there is still a Peerless Domain Ancestor in the Qingyuan Holy Land, although the strength of that Peerless Domain Ancestor is not very strong, but his cultivation has also reached the mid-stage realm of the Peerless Domain Ancestor, but it is not the Peerless Domain Ancestor who has just been promoted, are you sure you can deal with that Peerless Domain Ancestor?"

"Fire Pattern War Ancestor, I wonder if the Battle Realm Tower can withstand the battle of the Superior Domain Ancestor?" Ye Tian asked.

"Do you want to fight me?"

Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor smiled.

"Fire Pattern Battle Ancestor, that's exactly what I thought!"

Ye Tian nodded.

"Don't worry, the Battle Realm Tower is strong enough to withstand the battle of the Superior Domain Ancestor. "

With a wave of his hand, the two of them came to the deepest void of the Battle Realm Tower.

"This incarnation of mine also has the combat power of the Superior Domain Ancestor, what ability you have, just show it!"

Fire Emblem Battle Ancestral Road.

"Good!"

Ye Tian was not polite at all, and immediately cast the ancestral body.

Rumble!!!!!

The Eternal Immortal Ancestor Body erupted, and the terrifying aura made the Fire Pattern Battle Ancestor's expression change.

"Eternal Immortal Ancestral Body, you actually broke the limit of the Holy Body, and even crossed the process of half-step Ancestral Body, directly hitting the Ancestral Body level!!"

Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor was shocked.

Dumbfounded!

As a Peerless Domain Ancestor, although he broke the limit of the Holy Body, he is still a half-step Ancestral Body, but he is infinitely close to the Ancestral Body.

But I never expected that the little guy I saw at the beginning, after such a short period of time, would actually condense the ancestral body, and it is also an eternal immortal ancestral body, this is the first ancestral body of the Dark Sacred Domain, far beyond the ordinary ancestral body!

But the surprises continue!

I saw that Ye Tian had used the Golden Body Ancestral Technique and the Ancestral Armor Ancestral Technique, and his defensive power was completely full.

Then, with a wave of Ye Tianyi's hand, countless golden rays slammed towards the Fire Pattern Battle Ancestor.

This is the ancestral golden wire!

"Golden Silk Ancestral Technique, you have actually raised the Golden Silk Sacred Technique to the level of Ancestral Technique!"

The Fire Emblem War Ancestor was shocked again.

The Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor didn't dare to be careless, and directly burst out the power of the ancestral body, and then used the ancestral skill, the Fire Emblem Battle Body, to turn into a huge body the size of the Imperial Realm.

However, Ye Tian's Golden Silk Ancestral Technique penetrated his defenses and injured him.

However, the surprise was not only there, Ye Tian controlled sixty-two times the physical body, and then turned on the Extreme Ancestral Technique, holding a top-level saint soldier spear, and blasted towards the Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor.

Bang!

The body of the Fire Pattern Battle Ancestor was directly blasted out, countless voids were annihilated, and the battle between the two shook the Battle Realm Tower.

At this time, the countless domain ancestors and half-step domain ancestors in the Battle Realm Tower were panicked and didn't know what was going on.

Soon, the domain ancestors of the battle gate informed the other domain ancestors that it was the two peerless domain ancestors who were fighting, which made everyone worry about it.

At this time, they were very curious, which of the two peerless domain ancestors were fighting?

......

"False Slash!"

Ye Tian's other ancestral technique erupted, instantly cutting open the ancestral body of the Fire Pattern Battle Ancestor.

Next, under Ye Tian's continuous attacks, the Fire Pattern War Ancestor was actually beaten by Ye Tian.

The power of the incarnation was limited, and after a while, the incarnation of the Fire Emblem War Ancestor could not be maintained and completely collapsed.

After a while, the main body of the Fire Emblem War Ancestor descended.

"Ye Tian, your strength has indeed reached the combat power of the Invincible Domain Ancestor, and it is much stronger than the ordinary Peerless Domain Ancestor, the Peerless Domain Ancestor of the Qingyuan Holy Land is indeed not your opponent! This time you have a reason, and you use the Invincible Domain Ancestor to deal with the Qingyuan Holy Land, even if you destroy the Qingyuan Holy Land, the other Holy Gates and Holy Lands will not say anything. As for the rest, you don't have to worry, I'll take care of it!"

Fire Emblem Battle Ancestral Road.

"Thank you Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor!"

Ye Tian thanked.

Subsequently, Ye Tian left the Battle Realm Tower, and then condensed the copy body, and let the copy body go to the Qingyuan Holy Land!
